scope: Hybrid infra (chosen via q_infra_depth=C): in-process default + Supabase tables for persistence.
idempotency_guarantees: packets: PRIMARY KEY(packet_id) + upsert_packet on conflict preserves status.
queue_jobs: partial unique index (queue_class, packet_id) WHERE status IN ('enqueued','running') so the same packet cannot be enqueued twice while active.
scheduler_ticks: append-only log keyed by tick_id.
protocol_interchangeability: FixtureHarnessStore and SupabaseHarnessStore both satisfy HarnessStoreProtocol; tests use fixture store, production CLI uses Supabase.
